title: microlicia australis
intro: Microlicia australis, also known as the 'Red Ironbark', is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Melastomataceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, as it is said to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Microlicia australis include the potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Microlicia australis are typically made from its leaves and bark, which are often used to create teas, infusions, and topical applications.
